sentence: The meeting was _____ because the manager suddenly got sick this morning.
explanation: call off 指取消。經理臨時生病，會議被取消，故選 called off；put on 是穿上、looked up 是查閱，語意都不合。

sentence: I have been waiting _____ the bus stop for almost half an hour.
explanation: 表示在某個定點用介系詞 at。at the bus stop 指在公車站等車，故選 at。

sentence: Don't be too hard on yourself; everyone makes mistakes _____ .
explanation: once in a while 指偶爾。人人偶爾都會犯錯，故選 A；on time 是準時、by the way 是順帶一提，語意不合。

sentence: She promised to _____ her little brother while their parents were out shopping.
explanation: look after 指照顧。父母外出購物時她答應照顧弟弟，故選 look after；look for 是尋找、look out 是小心。

sentence: All the students are looking forward _____ the summer vacation next month.
explanation: look forward to 是固定搭配，to 後接名詞或動名詞，表示期待。故選 to。

sentence: The test had a few tricky parts, but _____ , I think I did pretty well.
explanation: on the whole 指整體而言。雖有難題，但整體表現不錯，故選 B；out of order 是故障，語意不合。

sentence: Please _____ your shoes before you come into the house.
explanation: take off 指脫下。進屋前要脫鞋，故選 take off；take after 是長得像、take over 是接管。

sentence: My sister is really good _____ playing the violin; she practices every single day.
explanation: be good at 指擅長，後接技能或活動。故選 at。

sentence: I ran as fast as I could and reached the platform _____ to catch the last train.
explanation: just in time 指及時、剛好趕上。拼命跑剛好趕上末班車，故選 C。

sentence: Our team will never _____ , even when we are losing by a lot.
explanation: give up 指放棄。即使大幅落後也不放棄，故選 give up；give back 是歸還、give away 是贈送。

sentence: This nature book is divided _____ five parts, each about a different kind of animal.
explanation: be divided into 指被分成，搭配 into 表示分成幾個部分。故選 into。

sentence: We didn't plan to meet, but we ran _____ each other at the busy night market.
explanation: run into 指偶然遇見。沒約卻在夜市巧遇，故選 into；run after 是追趕、run over 是輾過。

sentence: My birthday is _____ March.
explanation: 「in + 月份」表示某月份，故用 in March。

sentence: We don't have school _____ Saturday and Sunday.
explanation: 「on + 星期」表示星期幾，故用 on Saturday and Sunday。

sentence: The train leaves _____ six o'clock sharp.
explanation: 「at + 精確時刻」表示明確時間點，故用 at six o'clock。

sentence: There are twenty students _____ my classroom.
explanation: 「in + 封閉空間」表示教室裡面，故用 in my classroom。

sentence: Please put your bag _____ the table.
explanation: 「on + 表面」表示放在桌面上，故用 on the table。

sentence: It's dark in here; please _____ the light.
explanation: 房間很暗，要「打開」燈，故選 turn on。

sentence: Remember to _____ the TV before you go to bed.
explanation: 睡覺前要「關掉」電視，故選 turn off。

sentence: I usually _____ at six thirty every morning.
explanation: 描述每天早上「起床」的習慣，故選 get up。

sentence: Please _____ and make yourself comfortable.
explanation: 請對方「坐下」放輕鬆，故選 sit down。

sentence: When the teacher entered, all the students _____ to say hello.
explanation: 老師進來時全班「站起來」打招呼，故選 stood up。

sentence: I usually _____ at seven without an alarm clock.
explanation: 沒有鬧鐘也能自然「醒來」，故選 wake up。

sentence: Let's meet _____ the bus stop after school.
explanation: 「at + 定點」表示在公車站這個點，故用 at the bus stop。

sentence: My cousin lives _____ Taipei.
explanation: 「in + 城市」表示在台北市內，故用 in Taipei。

sentence: It's cold outside, so _____ your coat before you leave.
explanation: 天冷出門前要「穿上」外套，故選 put on。

sentence: Please _____ your room before dinner.
explanation: 晚餐前要把房間「整理乾淨」，故選 clean up。

sentence: "Can I borrow your pen?" "_____! Here you are."
explanation: 回應請求時表示「當然可以」，故選 Of course。

sentence: Some fruits, _____ apples and bananas, are good for your health.
explanation: 舉出蘋果、香蕉作為例子，故用 for example。

sentence: I'm _____ my glasses; have you seen them?
explanation: 正在「尋找」不見的眼鏡，故選 looking for。

sentence: Please _____ the blackboard while I explain this problem.
explanation: 上課時請大家「看」黑板，故選 look at。

sentence: We had to _____ the bus for almost thirty minutes.
explanation: 公車遲到，只好「等待」公車，故選 wait for。

sentence: Do you often _____ music while doing your homework?
explanation: 詢問是否常邊寫作業邊「聽」音樂，故選 listen to。

sentence: Whether we go hiking tomorrow will _____ the weather.
explanation: 是否去健行「取決於」天氣，故選 depend on。

sentence: This old bicycle used to _____ my grandfather.
explanation: 這台舊腳踏車以前「屬於」爺爺，故選 belong to。

sentence: I don't _____ your opinion about the new rule.
explanation: 表達不「同意」對方的意見，故選 agree with。

sentence: She has lived in this city _____ 2015.
explanation: 「since + 明確年份」表示從那時開始至今，故用 since 2015。

sentence: They have been married _____ ten years.
explanation: 「for + 一段時間」表示持續的時間長度，故用 for ten years。

sentence: Please turn off your phone _____ the movie.
explanation: 「during + 特定期間」表示在電影播放的那段期間，故用 during the movie。

sentence: After months of hard work, she _____ finished her novel.
explanation: 經過數月努力「終於」完成小說，故用 at last。

sentence: He looks calm, but _____, he is very nervous inside.
explanation: 外表看起來平靜，但「事實上」內心緊張，故用 in fact。

sentence: I didn't break the vase _____; it was an accident.
explanation: 句中的 didn't...on purpose 表示不是故意打破花瓶，是意外，故用 on purpose。

sentence: Don't forget to _____ your homework before Friday.
explanation: 提醒星期五前要「繳交」作業，故選 hand in。

sentence: The detective worked hard to _____ who had stolen the jewelry.
explanation: 偵探努力「查明」是誰偷走珠寶，故選 find out。

sentence: My new roommate and I _____ very well with each other.
explanation: 形容和新室友「相處」融洽，故選 get along。

sentence: She always solves problems calmly and _____ patience.
explanation: 「with + 特質」表示帶著耐心解決問題，故用 with patience。

sentence: Could you _____ some milk on your way home?
explanation: 回家路上「順便買」一些牛奶，故選 pick up。

sentence: Please _____ your toys before your friends come over.
explanation: 朋友來之前要把玩具「收好」，故選 put away。

sentence: It took her a while, but she finally managed to _____ the math problem.
explanation: 花了一些時間終於「解出」數學題，故選 work out。

sentence: The volunteers helped _____ the tents before the festival began.
explanation: 志工協助在慶典前「搭建」帳篷，故選 set up。

sentence: The teacher kindly _____ the mistakes in my essay.
explanation: 老師好心「指出」作文中的錯誤，故選 pointed out。

sentence: She woke up early _____ catch the first train.
explanation: 早起是「為了」趕搭第一班火車，故用 in order to。

sentence: He didn't study at all; _____, he failed the test.
explanation: 完全沒讀書，「結果」考試不及格，故用 as a result。

sentence: The flight arrived exactly _____ , which surprised everyone.
explanation: 班機準時抵達讓大家驚訝，故用 on time（準時，強調不早不晚）。

sentence: I didn't mean to delete the file; it happened _____.
explanation: 不是故意刪除檔案，是「意外」發生的，故用 by accident。

sentence: The manager asked the workers to stop the machine _____ .
explanation: 經理要求工人「立刻」停下機器，故用 at once。

sentence: She didn't tell us she was coming, but she suddenly _____ at the party.
explanation: turn up 指出現、意外到來。沒說會來卻突然出現在派對，故選 turned up。

sentence: The thief was forced to _____ all the stolen money to the police.
explanation: 小偷被迫把偷來的錢「交出」給警察，故選 hand over。

sentence: Everyone says that Lily _____ her mother in both looks and personality.
explanation: 大家都說 Lily 長相和個性都「像」她媽媽，故選 takes after。

sentence: It's never easy to _____ such a difficult time alone.
explanation: 獨自「經歷」困難的時期並不容易，故選 go through。

sentence: _____ the heavy rain, the game continued as scheduled.
explanation: 「Despite + 名詞」表示儘管下大雨比賽仍照常進行，故用 Despite。

sentence: You should never drive _____ wearing a seatbelt.
explanation: 開車時不應該「沒有」繫安全帶，故用 without。

sentence: You need to book your train ticket at least a week _____ .
explanation: 訂火車票至少要「提前」一週，故用 in advance。

sentence: We are all _____ the summer vacation next month.
explanation: 大家都很「期待」下個月的暑假，故選 looking forward to。

sentence: It took him months to _____ the loss of his beloved dog.
explanation: 花了好幾個月才「走出」失去愛犬的悲傷，故選 get over。

sentence: The new manager soon _____ strong resistance from the staff.
explanation: 新經理很快就「遭遇」員工強烈的抵制，故選 came up against。

sentence: Many young players _____ this legendary basketball star.
explanation: 許多年輕球員都「景仰」這位傳奇球星，故選 look up to。

sentence: It's not polite to _____ people just because they are poor.
explanation: 不應該因為貧窮就「看不起」別人，故選 look down on。

sentence: _____ , students in this school perform very well in English.
explanation: 「整體來說」這所學校的學生英文表現很好，故用 In general。

sentence: Some countries, _____ Japan and Korea, have very strict recycling rules.
explanation: 舉日本和韓國作為例子，故用 for instance。

sentence: She is, _____, the best singer in our school.
explanation: 「毫無疑問」她是學校裡最棒的歌手，故用 without doubt。

sentence: He isn't lazy at all; _____ , he works harder than anyone else.
explanation: 他一點都不懶惰，「相反地」比任何人都努力，故用 on the contrary。

sentence: _____ his young age, he speaks three languages fluently.
explanation: 「儘管」年紀小卻能流利說三種語言，故用 In spite of。

sentence: She decided to walk to work _____ taking the bus.
explanation: 決定走路上班「而不是」搭公車，故用 instead of。

sentence: You can always _____ your best friend in times of trouble.
explanation: 遇到困難時總能「依靠」最好的朋友，故選 count on。

sentence: It's not easy to _____ such a difficult customer.
explanation: 「應付」難搞的顧客並不容易，故選 deal with。

sentence: He worked overtime all week to _____ the days he had missed.
explanation: 加班一整週來「彌補」錯過的天數，故選 make up for。

sentence: During the holiday, I finally had time to _____ some sleep.
explanation: 假期終於有時間「補足」睡眠，故選 catch up on。

sentence: _____ the weather report, it will snow this weekend.
explanation: 「根據」氣象報告這週末會下雪，故用 According to。

sentence: The flight was delayed _____ the heavy fog.
explanation: 班機「由於」濃霧而延誤，故用 owing to。

sentence: The heavy traffic can partly _____ why he arrived so late.
explanation: 塞車可以部分「解釋」他為何遲到，故選 account for。

sentence: Jenny stayed home today because she _____ a bad cold.
explanation: Jenny 今天請假在家是因為她「染上」重感冒，故選 came down with。

sentence: The new manager decided to _____ the old, inefficient system completely.
explanation: 新經理決定完全「廢除」舊有沒效率的制度，故選 do away with。

sentence: If you skip too many classes, you will soon _____ in your studies.
explanation: 翹太多課很快就會「落後」課業，故選 fall behind。

sentence: The new movie failed to _____ the audience's high expectations.
explanation: 新電影未能「達到」觀眾很高的期待，故選 live up to。

sentence: A true friend will always _____ you when others speak badly of you.
explanation: 真正的朋友總會在別人說壞話時「挺身支持」你，故選 stand up for。

sentence: The doctors could not completely _____ the possibility of a serious illness.
explanation: 醫生無法完全「排除」罹患重病的可能性，故選 rule out。

sentence: I'm sorry, but I'm _____ with a meeting until three o'clock.
explanation: 因為開會到三點都「抽不開身」，故選 tied up。

sentence: Eating healthy food may seem boring now, but it pays off _____ .
explanation: 健康飲食現在看似無聊，但「長遠來看」值得，故用 in the long run。

sentence: I'm not sure if he will come, but _____ , we should prepare enough food.
explanation: 不確定他是否會來，但「無論如何」該準備足夠食物，故用 at any rate。

sentence: We don't have a permanent office yet, so we are working from home _____ .
explanation: 還沒有固定辦公室，「暫時」在家工作，故用 for the time being。

sentence: _____ , I should have listened to my parents' advice about the investment.
explanation: 「回想起來」早該聽父母對投資的建議，故用 In retrospect。

sentence: She tried hard to _____ her tears during the sad movie.
explanation: 她努力「忍住」在悲傷電影中的淚水，故選 hold back。

sentence: The effect of the painkiller will _____ after a few hours.
explanation: 止痛藥的效果幾小時後會「逐漸消退」，故選 wear off。

sentence: You should always _____ your important files in case your computer crashes.
explanation: 應該隨時「備份」重要檔案以防電腦當機，故選 back up。

sentence: Before the trip to France, I want to _____ my French.
explanation: 去法國前想「複習」法文，故選 brush up on。

sentence: The firefighters arrived _____ to save the family trapped inside.
explanation: 消防隊「在最後一刻」趕到救出受困家庭，故用 in the nick of time。

sentence: _____ , the small team managed to win the national championship.
explanation: 「儘管困難重重」小隊仍贏得全國冠軍，故用 Against all odds。

sentence: _____ , the new policy has been well received by the public.
explanation: 「整體而言」新政策獲得大眾好評，故用 By and large。

sentence: Parents often make sacrifices _____ their children's future.
explanation: 父母常「為了」孩子的未來做出犧牲，故用 for the sake of。

sentence: _____ , the students were thrilled when the exam was canceled.
explanation: 「不用說」也知道考試取消時學生們超興奮，故用 Needless to say。

sentence: He goes jogging every morning _____ .
explanation: 他每天早上「不論晴雨」都去慢跑，故用 come rain or shine。

sentence: Your application has been received, and you will hear from us _____ .
explanation: 申請已收到，「日後」會通知結果，故用 in due course。

sentence: My little brother cries _____ ; the smallest thing can upset him.
options: (A) in the blink of an eye
(D) at the drop of a hat
explanation: 弟弟「動不動」就哭，一點小事就能讓他難過，故用 at the drop of a hat。

sentence: After years of silence, she called me _____ last night.
options: (D) at the drop of a hat
explanation: 多年沉默後她昨晚「毫無預警地」打電話給我，故用 out of the blue。

sentence: The accident happened _____ ; no one had time to react.
options: (A) at the drop of a hat
(B) in the blink of an eye
explanation: 意外發生「在一瞬間」，沒人來得及反應，故用 in the blink of an eye。

sentence: A loyal friend will stand by you _____ .
explanation: 忠實的朋友會「不論好壞」都陪伴你，故用 through thick and thin。

sentence: After being cheated once, he never trusted strangers again; _____ , as they say.
explanation: 被騙過一次後他再也不信任陌生人，正所謂「一朝被蛇咬十年怕草繩」，故用 once bitten, twice shy。
optionsZh: 一朝被蛇咬十年怕草繩

sentence: _____ math, my sister is much better than I am.
explanation: 「說到」數學，我妹妹比我厲害得多，故用 When it comes to。

sentence: She didn't tell anyone about the accident _____ getting into trouble.
explanation: 她沒告訴任何人意外的事，是「因為害怕」惹上麻煩，故用 for fear of。

sentence: All the students passed the test _____ one who was absent that day.
explanation: 全班都通過測驗，「除了」當天缺席的那位同學，故用 with the exception of。

sentence: _____ , the project is complete; only a final review remains.
explanation: 「基本上／實際上」專案已經完成，只剩最後審查，故用 For all intents and purposes。

sentence: My car _____ on the highway, so I had to call for help.
explanation: break down 指（車輛、機器）故障。車子在高速公路上故障，故選 broke down；break up 是分手、break into 是闖入。

sentence: She didn't want to _____ the topic of money at the dinner table.
explanation: bring up 指提起、提出話題。她不想在餐桌上提起錢的話題，故選 bring up；bring back 是帶回、恢復。

sentence: The coach decided to _____ the youngest player to take the last shot.
explanation: call on 指指定、要求某人做某事。教練指定最年輕的球員投最後一球，故選 call on；call off 是取消。

sentence: Even though it started to rain, the players decided to _____ with the game.
explanation: carry on 指繼續。即使下雨球員仍決定繼續比賽，故選 carry on；carry out 是執行（計畫）。

sentence: We arrived at the hotel early, but we couldn't _____ until three o'clock.
explanation: check in 指辦理入住。太早到飯店，三點才能辦理入住，故選 check in；check out 是退房。

sentence: The old bookstore had to _____ after forty years of business.
explanation: close down 指（店家）歇業、關閉。老書店經營四十年後歇業，故選 close down；close up 是打烊。

sentence: Our teacher asked us to _____ a creative idea for the school festival.
explanation: come up with 指想出。老師要我們為校慶想出有創意的點子，故選 come up with；come across 是偶然發現。

sentence: The doctor told him to _____ sugar in order to stay healthy.
explanation: cut down on 指減少。醫生要他減少糖分攝取以維持健康，故選 cut down on；cut off 是切斷。

sentence: Feel free to _____ my house anytime you're in the neighborhood.
explanation: drop by 指順道拜訪。歡迎路過附近時順道來我家，故選 drop by；drop off 是送某人到某處。

sentence: Since my mom is too tired to cook tonight, let's _____ at the new restaurant.
explanation: eat out 指在外用餐。媽媽太累不想煮飯，故去外面餐廳吃，選 eat out；eat up 是吃光。

sentence: If you don't study harder, you might _____ failing the test.
explanation: end up 指最終落得、結果變成。不努力讀書最終可能考試不及格，故選 end up；end in 是以…告終。

sentence: It took me a long time to _____ how to solve the tricky puzzle.
explanation: figure out 指想通、弄懂。花很久才想通如何解開謎題，故選 figure out；其餘皆非常見用法。

sentence: Please _____ the blanks below with the correct words.
explanation: fill in the blanks 指填入空格，為固定搭配，故選 fill in；fill out 常搭配 form（表格）。

sentence: We need to _____ these old newspapers; they're taking up too much space.
explanation: get rid of 指擺脫、處理掉。舊報紙占空間該處理掉，故選 get rid of；get along with 是相處。

sentence: After hours of arguing, he finally decided to _____ and let his sister choose the movie.
explanation: give in 指讓步、屈服。爭吵多時後他終於讓步，讓妹妹選電影，故選 give in；give away 是贈送。

sentence: "Can I ask you something personal?" "Sure, _____ ."
explanation: go ahead 指請便、儘管做。回答對方可以問，故選 go ahead；go on 是繼續。

sentence: We usually _____ at the park after school, just talking and relaxing.
explanation: hang out 指聚在一起、閒逛。放學後常在公園聚聚聊天，故選 hang out；hang up 是掛電話。

sentence: She reads the news every day to _____ what's happening in the world.
explanation: keep up with 指跟上（進度、消息）。她每天看新聞以跟上世界大事，故選 keep up with；keep on 是繼續。

sentence: Don't _____ any details when you tell the story to the class.
explanation: leave out 指省略、遺漏。跟全班說故事時別遺漏細節，故選 leave out；leave behind 是遺留。

sentence: I promised to help her with the project, so I really don't want to _____ her.
explanation: let down 指讓…失望。答應要幫她，不想讓她失望，故選 let down；let in 是讓…進入。

sentence: The teacher asked us to _____ our essays carefully before handing them in.
explanation: look through 指仔細瀏覽、檢查。老師要我們交作文前先仔細檢查，故選 look through；look into 是調查。

sentence: The two friends had a big fight last week, but they quickly _____ .
explanation: make up 指和好。兩個朋友大吵一架後很快和好，故選 made up；make out 是理解、看出。

sentence: It's time to stop thinking about the past mistake and _____ .
explanation: move on 指向前邁進、繼續前進。該停止想過去的錯誤，勇敢向前，故選 move on；move in 是搬進。

sentence: The room was so hot and crowded that one of the students almost _____ .
explanation: pass out 指昏倒。房間又熱又擠讓學生差點昏倒，故選 pass out；pass by 是經過。

sentence: The police officer asked the driver to _____ to the side of the road.
explanation: pull over 指把車停靠到路邊。警察要求駕駛靠邊停車，故選 pull over；pull out 是駛出、退出。

sentence: Could you _____ your phone for a minute and listen to me?
explanation: put down 指放下（手上的東西）。要求對方先放下手機聽自己說話，故選 put down；put off 是延後。

sentence: We had to stop the road trip because we _____ gas in the middle of nowhere.
explanation: run out of 指用完。路途中汽油用完只好停下旅行，故選 ran out of；ran into 是偶然遇見。

sentence: He promised to come to the party, but in the end he never _____ .
explanation: show up 指出現、露面。他答應要來派對卻始終沒出現，故選 showed up；show off 是炫耀。

sentence: The old factory had to _____ because of the strict new pollution laws.
explanation: shut down 指（工廠、公司）關閉停業。因新環保法規工廠須關閉，故選 shut down；shut off 是關掉開關。

sentence: Many students want to _____ the summer art class this year.
explanation: sign up for 指報名參加。許多學生想報名暑期美術班，故選 sign up for；sign in 是簽到。

sentence: The doctor told my grandfather to _____ and rest more often.
explanation: slow down 指放慢腳步、放慢步調。醫生要爺爺放慢步調多休息，故選 slow down；speed up 是加速。

sentence: It took the two brothers a long time to _____ their disagreement about the will.
explanation: sort out 指解決、釐清。兩兄弟花很久才解決遺產的爭議，故選 sort out；look into 是調查。

sentence: I _____ late last night trying to finish my science project.
explanation: stay up 指熬夜。昨晚熬夜趕科展作業，故選 stayed up；stay in 是待在家裡不出門。

sentence: When the manager was sick, his assistant had to _____ and lead the meeting.
explanation: step in 指介入、代理。經理生病時助理必須代理主持會議，故選 step in；step back 是退後。

sentence: My older sister always _____ me when our parents are working late.
explanation: take care of 指照顧。父母加班時姐姐總是照顧我，故選 take care of；take away 是拿走。

sentence: Please don't _____ that empty box; I still need it for moving.
explanation: throw away 指丟棄。搬家還需要那個空箱子，別丟掉，故選 throw away；throw up 是嘔吐。

sentence: She wanted to _____ the red dress before deciding to buy it.
explanation: try on 指試穿。買紅色洋裝前先試穿，故選 try on；try out 是試用、試驗。

sentence: The weather forecast said it would rain, but it _____ to be a sunny day.
explanation: turn out 指結果是、原來是。氣象說會下雨，結果卻是晴天，故選 turned out；turn up 是出現。

sentence: We _____ all the milk this morning, so we need to buy more today.
explanation: use up 指用完、耗盡。早上把牛奶喝光了，需要再買，故選 used up；use for 是用於。

sentence: The players did some light exercise to _____ before the big game started.
explanation: warm up 指暖身。比賽開始前做輕度運動暖身，故選 warm up；heat up 是加熱、升溫。

sentence: _____ cars when you cross the street, even at a green light.
explanation: watch out for 指小心、留意。過馬路時要留意來車，故選 Watch out for；watch over 是看守、照看。

sentence: The manager was _____ several complaints from customers about the delay.
explanation: be faced with 指面臨。經理面臨多起顧客的抱怨，故選 faced with；其餘皆非固定用法。

sentence: He was so nervous before the speech that he could hardly _____ two words.
explanation: get out 此處指說出、擠出。緊張到幾乎說不出兩個字，故選 get out；get off 是下車。

sentence: After the storm, the town needed months to _____ from the damage.
explanation: get over 指從（困難、疾病）恢復。暴風雨過後小鎮花數月才復原，故選 get over；get back 是回到、拿回。

sentence: The little boy tried hard to _____ his fear of the dark.
explanation: get over 指克服。小男孩努力克服對黑暗的恐懼，故選 get over；get through 是通過、完成。

sentence: Because of the exam, she has to _____ a lot of stress this week.
explanation: get through 指撐過、經歷過。因為考試這週要撐過很大壓力，故選 get through；get up 是起床。

sentence: The new intern is very smart, but he needs to _____ better with his coworkers.
explanation: get along 指相處。新來的實習生聰明但需要跟同事更好相處，故選 get along；get over 是克服。

sentence: The soldiers finally _____ after weeks of fierce fighting.
explanation: give in 指屈服、投降。經過數週激戰士兵們終於屈服，故選 gave in；give back 是歸還。

sentence: During the charity event, the volunteers _____ free meals to homeless people.
explanation: give out 指發放。志工在慈善活動中發放免費餐點，故選 gave out；give up 是放棄。

sentence: Please _____ your report card to your parents and get it signed.
explanation: hand in 指繳交。此處是把成績單交給父母簽名，注意是交付給某人，故選 hand in（交給）。

sentence: The teacher will _____ the test papers to us at the beginning of the class.
explanation: hand out 指分發。老師會在課堂開始時發下考卷，故選 hand out；hand in 是繳交。

sentence: This old recipe has been _____ from generation to generation in our family.
explanation: hand down 指代代相傳。這道古老食譜在家族中代代相傳，故選 handed down；hand out 是分發。

sentence: After a long search, the police finally _____ where the missing dog was hiding.
explanation: find out 指查明、發現。經過長時間搜尋，警方終於查明走失的狗躲在哪，故選 found out。

sentence: Could you _____ some bread on your way home from work?
explanation: pick up 指順便買。下班回家路上順便買些麵包，故選 pick up；pick on 是找碴。

sentence: It's not fair to always _____ the youngest kid in the group.
explanation: pick on 指找…麻煩、欺負。總是欺負團體中最小的孩子不公平，故選 pick on；pick up 是撿起。

sentence: The company will _____ a new branch in the city center next spring.
explanation: set up 指設立、成立。公司明年春天將在市中心設立新分店，故選 set up；set off 是出發。

sentence: The hikers decided to _____ before sunrise to avoid the midday heat.
explanation: set off 指出發。登山客決定日出前出發以避開正午的酷熱，故選 set off；set up 是設立。

sentence: It took her a while, but she finally managed to _____ the science problem.
explanation: work out 指解決、算出。花了一些時間終於解出科學題目，故選 work out；work on 是致力於。

sentence: He has been _____ this painting for over a month, and it's still not finished.
explanation: work on 指致力於、忙於。他花一個多月忙著畫這幅畫，還沒完成，故選 working on；work out 是解決。

sentence: We had to _____ the delivery truck for almost an hour at the gate.
explanation: wait for 指等待。在門口等貨車將近一小時，故選 wait for；wait up 是熬夜等待。

sentence: My mother always _____ for me until I get home safely, no matter how late.
explanation: wait up 指熬夜等待某人。不論多晚媽媽總是熬夜等我平安到家，故選 waits up；wait on 是伺候。

sentence: She tried hard to _____ her laughter during the serious meeting.
explanation: hold back 指忍住、抑制。她努力在嚴肅會議中忍住笑意，故選 hold back；hold on 是稍等。

sentence: "_____ a second, I need to grab my umbrella before we leave."
explanation: hold on 指稍等。請對方等一下，自己去拿雨傘，故選 Hold on；hold back 是忍住。

sentence: The rescue team is still trying to _____ contact with the missing climbers.
explanation: 此句 make contact 為固定搭配，指建立聯繫。搜救隊仍試圖與失蹤登山客取得聯繫，故選 make。

sentence: I _____ an old photo of my grandparents while cleaning out the attic.
explanation: come across 指偶然發現。整理閣樓時偶然發現爺爺奶奶的舊照片，故選 came across；come into 是進入。

sentence: During the holiday, I finally had time to _____ some much-needed sleep.
explanation: catch up on 指補做落後的事。假期終於有時間補足睡眠，故選 catch up on；catch up with 是趕上某人。

sentence: After being away for years, it took him a while to _____ his old classmates.
explanation: catch up with 指（在消息或進度上）趕上某人。離開多年後花時間才跟老同學敘舊、跟上近況，故選 catch up with。

sentence: You can always _____ your best friend when you need someone to talk to.
explanation: count on 指依靠。需要傾訴時總能依靠最好的朋友，故選 count on；count down 是倒數。

sentence: The whole class started _____ the last ten seconds before the bell rang.
explanation: count down 指倒數。下課鈴響前全班開始倒數最後十秒，故選 counting down；count on 是依靠。

sentence: It's not easy to _____ such a strict and demanding customer.
explanation: deal with 指應付、處理。應付嚴格苛刻的顧客並不容易，故選 deal with；deal in 是經營、買賣。

sentence: You should always _____ your important files in case your laptop breaks.
explanation: back up 指備份。應隨時備份重要檔案以防筆電故障，故選 back up；back down 是讓步、放棄。

sentence: After the loud argument, he finally had to _____ and apologize.
explanation: back down 指讓步、退讓。激烈爭吵後他最終讓步並道歉，故選 back down；back up 是備份。

sentence: The effect of the medicine will _____ after about six hours.
explanation: wear off 指（藥效等）逐漸消退。藥效約六小時後會逐漸消退，故選 wear off；wear out 是穿舊、耗損。

sentence: These old running shoes are completely _____ after two years of daily use.
explanation: wear out 指（物品）穿舊耗損。這雙舊跑鞋每天穿兩年已經完全磨損，故選 worn out；wear off 是藥效消退。

sentence: Before the interview, I want to _____ my presentation skills.
explanation: brush up on 指複習、加強。面試前想加強自己的簡報技巧，故選 brush up on。

sentence: If you skip too many lessons, you will soon _____ in your studies.
explanation: fall behind 指落後。翹太多課很快就會落後課業，故選 fall behind；fall apart 是崩潰、破裂。

sentence: Their plan to open a new store _____ due to a lack of funding.
explanation: fall through 指（計畫）落空、失敗。因資金不足他們開新店的計畫落空，故選 fell through；fall apart 是崩潰。

sentence: The doctors could not completely _____ the possibility of a mild allergy.
explanation: rule out 指排除。醫生無法完全排除輕微過敏的可能性，故選 rule out；rule over 是統治。

sentence: No matter what people say behind her back, her best friend always _____ her.
explanation: stand up for 指挺身支持、捍衛。真正的朋友總會在別人說壞話時挺身支持你，故選 stand up for。

sentence: It's brave to _____ a bully, even if you might get into trouble.
explanation: stand up to 指勇敢對抗。即使可能惹上麻煩，勇敢對抗霸凌者是很勇敢的，故選 stand up to；stand up for 是支持。

sentence: The teacher kindly _____ several grammar mistakes in my essay.
explanation: point out 指指出。老師好心指出我作文中的幾個文法錯誤，故選 pointed out；pointed at 是指著。

sentence: Everyone says that Kevin _____ his father in both looks and personality.
explanation: take after 指長相或個性像（家人）。大家都說 Kevin 長相和個性都像爸爸，故選 takes after；take over 是接管。

sentence: After graduation, my brother plans to _____ a new hobby: painting.
explanation: take up 指開始從事（嗜好、活動）。畢業後哥哥打算開始學畫畫這項新嗜好，故選 take up；take over 是接管。

sentence: The new CEO plans to _____ the entire company next year.
explanation: take over 指接管。新執行長計畫明年接管整間公司，故選 take over；take up 是開始從事。

sentence: Please _____ your umbrella before you get into the car; it's dripping wet.
explanation: 此句要「收起」雨傘，最合語意的是 close（收合傘），其餘 put 系列片語皆語意不合。

sentence: Please _____ your muddy shoes before you come into the living room.
explanation: take off 指脫下。進客廳前要脫掉沾泥的鞋子，故選 take off；take after 是長得像。

sentence: It's cold outside today, so remember to _____ your warm jacket.
explanation: put on 指穿上。今天外面很冷，要記得穿上保暖外套，故選 put on；take off 是脫下。

sentence: Please _____ your toys and books before your cousins come over.
explanation: put away 指收好。表哥表姐要來之前把玩具和書本收好，故選 put away；put off 是延後。

sentence: The outdoor concert had to be _____ because of the sudden thunderstorm.
explanation: put off 指延後。因突如其來的雷雨，戶外演唱會必須延期，故選 put off；put on 是穿上。

sentence: It's dark in this room; please _____ the lamp on the desk.
explanation: turn on 指打開（電器）。房間很暗，請打開桌上的檯燈，故選 turn on；turn off 是關掉。

sentence: Remember to _____ the air conditioner before you leave the classroom.
explanation: turn off 指關掉。離開教室前要記得關掉冷氣，故選 turn off；turn on 是打開。

sentence: Could you _____ the music a little? It's too loud for me to study.
explanation: turn down 指調低（音量）。音樂太吵了希望調低音量以便讀書，故選 turn down；turn up 是調高。

sentence: Could you _____ the volume a bit? I can barely hear the movie.
explanation: turn up 指調高（音量）。幾乎聽不到電影聲音，需要調高音量，故選 turn up；turn down 是調低。

sentence: I usually _____ at half past six, even on weekends.
explanation: get up 指起床。描述每天六點半起床的習慣，即便週末也是，故選 get up；get off 是下車。

sentence: Please _____ and take a seat; the meeting will begin soon.
explanation: 請對方坐下入座，會議即將開始，故選 sit down；stand up 是站起來。

sentence: When the principal entered the classroom, all the students _____ politely.
explanation: 校長進教室時全班禮貌地站起來，故選 stood up；sat down 是坐下。

sentence: I usually _____ around six without needing an alarm clock.
explanation: 沒有鬧鐘也能自然醒來，故選 wake up；get up 指起床這個動作，wake up 指醒來的瞬間，符合語意。

sentence: We didn't plan to meet at all, but we ran _____ each other at the airport.
explanation: run into 指偶然遇見。完全沒約好卻在機場巧遇，故選 into；run after 是追趕。

sentence: I'm _____ my house keys; I think I left them in the classroom.
explanation: 正在尋找不見的鑰匙，可能忘在教室，故選 looking for；look after 是照顧。

sentence: She promised to _____ the neighbor's cat while they were on vacation.
explanation: look after 指照顧。她答應鄰居度假時幫忙照顧貓，故選 look after；look for 是尋找。

sentence: Many young athletes truly _____ this famous Olympic runner.
explanation: look up to 指景仰。許多年輕運動員真心景仰這位知名奧運選手，故選 look up to；look down on 是看不起。

sentence: It's unkind to _____ someone just because they dress differently.
explanation: look down on 指看不起。因為別人穿著不同就看不起是不友善的，故選 look down on；look up to 是景仰。

sentence: The manager will personally _____ any safety issues that customers report.
explanation: look into 指調查。經理會親自調查顧客回報的任何安全問題，故選 look into；look after 是照顧。

sentence: If you don't know a word, you can always _____ it in a dictionary.
explanation: look up 指查閱。不懂的單字可以查字典，故選 look up；look for 是尋找。

sentence: All the students are really _____ the school trip next Friday.
explanation: look forward to 指期待。所有學生都非常期待下週五的校外教學，故選 looking forward to。

sentence: The thief was eventually forced to _____ the stolen bicycle to its owner.
explanation: hand over 指交出（給某人）。小偷最終被迫把偷來的腳踏車交還給主人，故選 hand over；hand in 是繳交。

sentence: He worked overtime every night this week to _____ the days he was absent.
explanation: make up for 指彌補。這週每晚加班以彌補缺席的天數，故選 make up for；make out of 是從…製成。

sentence: The heavy snowstorm can partly _____ why the flight was so delayed.
explanation: account for 指解釋、說明。暴風雪可部分解釋班機延誤的原因，故選 account for。

sentence: Tommy stayed home from school today because he _____ a bad fever.
explanation: come down with 指染上（疾病）。Tommy 今天請假在家是因為染上重感冒，故選 came down with。

sentence: The school decided to _____ the outdated dress code completely.
explanation: do away with 指廢除、擺脫。學校決定完全廢除過時的服儀規定，故選 do away with。

sentence: The new smartphone failed to _____ the fans' extremely high expectations.
explanation: live up to 指達到（期望）。新手機未能達到粉絲極高的期待，故選 live up to。

sentence: I'm sorry, but I'll be _____ with schoolwork until Sunday afternoon.
explanation: tied up 指抽不開身、忙碌。到週日下午前都會忙著功課，故選 tied up；tied down 是受束縛。

sentence: We didn't plan to meet, but we happened to _____ each other outside the library.
explanation: come across 指偶然遇見（或發現）。沒約好卻在圖書館外巧遇，故選 came across；come into 是進入。

sentence: After the long hike, we were _____ before we finally reached the summit.
explanation: wear out 此處指人筋疲力盡。長途健行後在到達山頂前已經筋疲力盡，故選 worn out。

sentence: The little girl finally _____ crying once her mother came back.
explanation: give up 指停止、放棄（動作）。媽媽回來後小女孩終於停止哭泣，故選 gave up；hold back 是忍住。

sentence: The strong wind almost _____ the tent during the campsite storm.
explanation: blow away 指被風吹走。露營時暴風差點把帳篷吹走，故選 blew away；blow out 是吹熄。

sentence: Please remember to _____ the candles before you leave the room.
explanation: blow out 指吹熄。離開房間前記得吹熄蠟燭，故選 blow out；blow up 是爆炸。

sentence: The tired old bridge finally _____ after decades of heavy use.
explanation: break down 指損壞、倒塌。老舊的橋在數十年使用後終於損壞，故選 broke down；break out 是爆發。

sentence: A sudden fire _____ in the kitchen, but luckily no one was hurt.
explanation: break out 指（火災、戰爭等）爆發。廚房突然發生火災，幸好沒人受傷，故選 broke out。

sentence: The famous band decided to _____ after fifteen years of performing together.
explanation: break up 指（團體、關係）解散。知名樂團決定在合作十五年後解散，故選 break up；break out 是爆發。

sentence: The band's practice room was too small, so they had to _____ a bigger place.
explanation: look for 指尋找。練團室太小，所以必須尋找更大的地方，故選 look for；look up 是查閱。

sentence: The kind neighbor offered to _____ our mail while we were away.
explanation: pick up 指順便拿、收取。好心的鄰居提議在我們外出時幫忙拿信，故選 pick up。

sentence: The chef carefully _____ the fresh vegetables for the salad.
explanation: pick out 指挑出、選出。主廚仔細挑選出新鮮蔬菜做沙拉，故選 picked out；pick on 是找碴。

sentence: The workers spent the whole afternoon trying to _____ the fallen tree from the road.
explanation: clean up 指清理。工人花了整個下午試圖清理道路上倒下的樹，故選 clean up。

sentence: Before the guests arrive, we need to completely _____ the storage closet.
explanation: clean out 指徹底清空。客人來之前要徹底清空儲藏室，故選 clean out；clean up 是整理乾淨。

sentence: Whether the picnic happens tomorrow will completely _____ the weather.
explanation: depend on 指取決於。野餐是否舉行完全取決於天氣，故選 depend on。

sentence: I really don't _____ your decision to quit the team without telling anyone.
explanation: agree with 指同意（某人的看法或做法）。表達不同意在沒告知任何人的情況下退隊的決定，故選 agree with。

sentence: This antique clock used to _____ my great-grandmother a hundred years ago.
explanation: belong to 指屬於。這個古董鐘一百年前屬於我的曾祖母，故選 belong to。

sentence: Do you often _____ podcasts while you're doing chores at home?
explanation: listen to 指聽。詢問是否常邊做家事邊聽播客節目，故選 listen to。

sentence: The store owner had to _____ dozens of angry customers after the price increase.
explanation: deal with 指應付、處理。漲價後店主必須應付數十位憤怒的顧客，故選 deal with。

sentence: The company's new logo _____ a lot of criticism online.
explanation: come up against 指遭遇（阻力、反對）。公司新標誌在網路上遭遇不少批評，故選 came up against。

sentence: The waiter kindly _____ the best dishes on the menu for us.
explanation: point out 指指出、推薦說明。服務生好心向我們指出菜單上最好的菜色，故選 pointed out。

sentence: It's never easy to _____ such a stressful period alone, without any support.
explanation: go through 指經歷。獨自沒有支援地經歷壓力大的時期並不容易，故選 go through；go over 是複習、檢查。

sentence: Before the final exam, we should _____ all the notes one more time.
explanation: go over 指複習、檢查。期末考前應該再複習一次所有筆記，故選 go over；go through 是經歷。

sentence: He isn't shy at all; _____ , he loves talking to strangers.
explanation: on the contrary 指相反地。他一點都不害羞，「相反地」還很愛跟陌生人聊天，故選 on the contrary。

sentence: _____ his lack of experience, the new employee did an excellent job.
explanation: in spite of 指儘管。儘管缺乏經驗，這位新員工表現非常出色，故選 In spite of。

sentence: She chose to take notes by hand _____ typing on her laptop.
explanation: instead of 指而不是。她選擇用手寫筆記而不是打電腦，故選 instead of。

sentence: _____ , students who read every day tend to write better essays.
explanation: in general 指整體來說。整體來說，每天閱讀的學生作文寫得比較好，故選 In general。

sentence: Some fruits, _____ mangoes and lychees, are especially popular in summer.
explanation: for instance 指舉例來說。舉芒果和荔枝作為夏天特別受歡迎的水果例子，故選 for instance。

sentence: She is, _____, the most talented painter in our art club.
explanation: without doubt 指毫無疑問。毫無疑問她是美術社最有天分的畫家，故選 without doubt。

sentence: You can always _____ your grandmother to make you feel better.
explanation: count on 指依靠。心情不好時總能依靠奶奶讓你好過一些，故選 count on。

sentence: It's not easy to _____ a customer who keeps changing their mind.
explanation: deal with 指應付、處理。應付不斷改變心意的顧客並不容易，故選 deal with。

sentence: Eating too much fast food may seem fine now, but it hurts your health _____ .
explanation: in the long run 指長遠來看。現在看似無所謂，但長遠來看對健康有害，故選 in the long run。

sentence: I'm not sure she'll agree, but _____ , we should ask her first.
explanation: at any rate 指無論如何。不確定她是否會同意，但無論如何該先問她，故選 at any rate。

sentence: We haven't found a permanent apartment yet, so we're staying with relatives _____ .
explanation: for the time being 指暫時。還沒找到固定的公寓，暫時住在親戚家，故選 for the time being。

sentence: _____ , I really should have saved more money during college.
explanation: in retrospect 指回想起來。回想起來大學時真的該多存些錢，故選 In retrospect。

sentence: The team trains every single day, _____ , even during holidays.
explanation: come rain or shine 指不論晴雨、風雨無阻。球隊每天都訓練，連假日也不例外，故選 come rain or shine。

sentence: We sent in the paperwork, and you should hear the results _____ .
explanation: in due course 指日後、到時候。文件已送出，結果會日後通知，故選 in due course。

sentence: My little cousin gets upset _____ ; almost anything can make him cry.
options: (C) in the blink of an eye
(D) at the drop of a hat
explanation: at the drop of a hat 指動不動就。表弟動不動就難過，幾乎任何小事都能讓他哭，故選 at the drop of a hat。

sentence: After months without any word, she texted me _____ last weekend.
options: (A) at the drop of a hat
explanation: out of the blue 指毫無預警地。好幾個月沒消息，她上週末突然傳訊息給我，故選 out of the blue。

sentence: A good teammate will support you _____ , win or lose.
explanation: through thick and thin 指患難與共、不論好壞。好隊友無論輸贏都會患難與共地支持你，故選 through thick and thin。

sentence: _____ art, my little sister is far more talented than I am.
explanation: when it comes to 指說到、談及。說到藝術，我妹妹比我有天分得多，故選 When it comes to。

sentence: She kept the accident a secret _____ upsetting her parents.
explanation: for fear of 指因為害怕。她把意外的事保密，是因為害怕讓父母難過，故選 for fear of。

sentence: All the players showed up for practice _____ the goalkeeper, who was sick.
explanation: with the exception of 指除了…之外（不包括）。除了生病的守門員，所有球員都到場練習，故選 with the exception of。

sentence: Parents often give up their own free time _____ their children's happiness.
explanation: for the sake of 指為了…的緣故。父母常為了孩子的快樂放棄自己的空閒時間，故選 for the sake of。

sentence: _____ , everyone was relieved when the storm finally passed.
explanation: needless to say 指不用說。不用說大家在暴風雨終於過去後都鬆了一口氣，故選 Needless to say。

sentence: _____ , the underdog team ended up winning the championship.
explanation: against all odds 指儘管困難重重。實力較弱的隊伍儘管困難重重最終贏得冠軍，故選 Against all odds。

sentence: _____ , the museum's new exhibit has received mostly positive reviews.
explanation: by and large 指整體而言。整體而言博物館的新展覽獲得大多正面評價，故選 By and large。

sentence: He looks confident on stage, but _____, he gets extremely nervous.
explanation: in fact 指事實上。他在台上看起來自信，但事實上非常緊張，故選 in fact。

sentence: I didn't spill the juice _____ ; my hand just slipped.
explanation: 句意「不是故意」把果汁灑出，是手滑，故用 on purpose（故意地）搭配 didn't 表示否定。

sentence: The bus arrived exactly _____ , which was a nice surprise for everyone.
explanation: on time 指準時，強調不早不晚。公車準時抵達讓大家驚喜，故選 on time。

sentence: I didn't mean to erase the document; it happened _____.
explanation: by accident 指意外地。不是故意刪除文件，是意外發生的，故選 by accident。

sentence: The lifeguard told everyone to leave the pool _____ .
explanation: at once 指立刻。救生員要求大家立刻離開泳池，故選 at once。

sentence: You should reserve a table at that popular restaurant several days _____ .
explanation: in advance 指提前。訂那間熱門餐廳要提前好幾天，故選 in advance。

sentence: Could you explain your plan _____ so everyone understands it clearly?
explanation: in detail 指詳細地。請對方詳細說明計畫讓大家都清楚，故選 in detail。

sentence: To summarize everything I've said, _____, we need more time and money.
explanation: in short 指簡言之。總結所說的一切，簡言之就是需要更多時間和金錢，故選 in short。

sentence: Bring an umbrella _____ it rains during the field trip.
explanation: in case 指以防萬一。校外教學帶把傘以防下雨，故選 in case。

sentence: _____ the money, the volunteers also spent their weekends helping build the shelter.
explanation: in addition to 指除了…之外（還有）。除了捐款，志工也花週末協助蓋收容所，故選 In addition to。

sentence: _____ the traffic jam, we still managed to arrive at the airport in time.
explanation: despite 指儘管，後接名詞。儘管塞車還是準時到機場，故選 Despite。

sentence: _____ the weather report, a typhoon will hit the island this weekend.
explanation: according to 指根據。根據氣象報告，這週末颱風將侵襲該島，故選 According to。

sentence: The outdoor wedding was postponed _____ the sudden heavy rain.
explanation: owing to 指由於。因突如其來的大雨，戶外婚禮延期，故選 owing to。

sentence: Some students, _____ those in the science club, stayed late to finish the project.
explanation: such as 指例如。舉科學社的學生為例，說明他們留下來完成專題，故選 such as。

sentence: _____ , I'd like to thank everyone who helped organize this event.
explanation: first of all 指首先。首先要感謝所有協助籌辦這場活動的人，故選 First of all。

sentence: _____ , I want to remind everyone about tomorrow's early meeting time.
explanation: last but not least 指最後但同樣重要的是。最後想提醒大家明天開會時間提早，故選 Last but not least。

sentence: _____ , this year's science fair was a great success for our school.
explanation: all in all 指總的來說。總的來說，今年的科展對我們學校是一大成功，故選 All in all。

sentence: _____ , I think the movie's ending could have been better.
explanation: to some extent 指某種程度上。某種程度上我覺得電影結局可以更好，故選 To some extent。

sentence: This shirt is currently _____ , so you might have to order a different color.
explanation: out of stock 指缺貨。這件襯衫目前缺貨，可能要訂別的顏色，故選 out of stock。

sentence: My phone's map app is always _____ , so I never get lost driving.
explanation: up to date 指最新、更新的。手機地圖總是保持最新，所以開車不會迷路，故選 up to date。

sentence: The teacher explained the experiment _____ so no one would get confused.
explanation: step by step 指按部就班地。老師按部就班地說明實驗以免大家搞混，故選 step by step。

sentence: The twins always walk to school _____ , holding hands the whole way.
explanation: hand in hand 指攜手地。雙胞胎總是攜手走路上學，一路牽著手，故選 hand in hand。

sentence: I'd rather discuss this problem with you _____ than over the phone.
explanation: face to face 指面對面地。想跟對方面對面討論這個問題而不是講電話，故選 face to face。

sentence: The two runners crossed the finish line _____ , almost at the same second.
explanation: side by side 指並肩地。兩位跑者幾乎同時、並肩衝過終點線，故選 side by side。

sentence: His explanation was so confusing that it didn't _____ to anyone in the room.
explanation: make sense 指說得通、有道理。他的解釋太混亂，房裡沒人聽得懂，故選 make sense。

sentence: Please double-check your answers to _____ you didn't make any careless mistakes.
explanation: make sure 指確認、確保。請再檢查一次答案以確保沒有粗心錯誤，故選 make sure。

sentence: Because there was only one swing, the kids had to _____ using it.
explanation: take turns 指輪流。只有一個鞦韆，孩子們必須輪流使用，故選 take turns。

sentence: The school festival will _____ in the gym this year instead of the playground.
explanation: take place 指舉行、發生。今年校慶將在體育館舉行而非操場，故選 take place。

sentence: Everyone was asked to _____ in the charity walk this Saturday.
explanation: take part 指參與。大家被邀請參與這週六的慈善健走，故選 take part。

sentence: I haven't seen a movie in the theater _____ this year; I've mostly watched shows at home.
explanation: so far 指到目前為止。到目前為止今年幾乎沒進戲院看電影，故選 so far。

sentence: If you keep skipping practice, you will _____ lose your spot on the team.
explanation: sooner or later 指遲早。一直翹練習遲早會失去球隊的位置，故選 sooner or later。

sentence: The manager wants to solve this problem _____ so it never happens again.
explanation: once and for all 指一勞永逸地。經理想一勞永逸地解決這個問題，讓它不再發生，故選 once and for all。

sentence: He forgot his lines during the play, but he managed to keep going _____ .
explanation: all the same 指儘管如此、仍然。他忘詞了，儘管如此仍設法繼續演下去，故選 all the same。

sentence: _____ , I don't think we should cancel the trip just because of a small chance of rain.
explanation: in my opinion 指依我看、我認為。表達個人看法：不該因小雨機率就取消旅行，故選 In my opinion。

sentence: "May I use your calculator?" "_____ , here it is."
explanation: by all means 指當然可以。回應對方可以借用計算機，故選 By all means。

sentence: The soldiers were ordered to defend the bridge _____ .
explanation: at all costs 指不惜代價。士兵們被命令不惜代價守住這座橋，故選 at all costs。

sentence: _____ , it's a difficult decision, and I understand why you're hesitant.
explanation: at the same time 此處指同時、話雖如此。同時這確實是個困難的決定，理解你猶豫的原因，故選 At the same time。

sentence: I like the beach in summer; my sister, _____ , prefers the mountains.
explanation: on the other hand 指另一方面。我喜歡夏天的海邊，但另一方面姐姐偏好山區，故選 on the other hand。

sentence: He said he was "taking a short break," _____ , he quit the job.
explanation: in other words 指換句話說。他說是「短暫休息」，換句話說就是辭職了，故選 in other words。

sentence: _____ , the new student hasn't made any friends yet, but it's only been a week.
explanation: as far as I know 指據我所知。據我所知新同學還沒交到朋友，但才過一週，故選 As far as I know。

sentence: The little dog stood _____ its owner, refusing to move an inch.
explanation: in front of 指在…前面。小狗站在主人前面，拒絕移動半步，故選 in front of。

sentence: It's _____ you now to decide whether to join the debate team or not.
explanation: be up to 指由…決定。是否加入辯論隊現在由你自己決定，故選 up to。
